<!--
TITLE FORMAT:
TASK-<MODULE>-<ID> – Short description

EXAMPLES:
TASK-AUTH-001 – Prepare test data for login
TASK-SETUP-001 – Configure test environment
-->

## 📌 Task Description
Clearly describe what needs to be done.

---

## 🎯 Objective
What is the purpose of this task?

Examples:
- Prepare test data
- Configure environment
- Support testing process

---

## 📂 Scope
What is included in this task?

- [ ] Activity 1
- [ ] Activity 2
- [ ] Activity 3

---

## ⚙️ Preconditions
List required conditions before starting the task.

- [ ] Access to environment
- [ ] Required tools available
- [ ] Dependencies resolved

---

## 🔢 Steps / Actions
Describe the steps needed to complete the task.

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

---

## ✅ Expected Outcome
Describe what should be achieved after completing the task.

---

## 🧭 Priority
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

## 🔗 Related Items
- EPIC-XXX-001
- STORY-XXX-001
- TC-XXX-001

---

## 📎 Evidence (if applicable)
- Screenshots
- Logs
- Config files

---

## 📝 Notes
Additional information, blockers, or observations.
